analysis.reasoning: Core message: Lavrov praises Russia-Italy relations as longstanding, successful, and built on mutual trust. Evaluation: RU1 (West immoral/hostile) – not present; the tweet does not criticize the West. RU2 (Russia leads an alternative system) – not present; no mention of multipolarity or alternatives to Western order. RU3 (Russia is a benevolent partner) – supported; it portrays Russia as a trustworthy, cooperative partner with Italy, emphasizing history, success, and trust. RU4 (Russian history admirable) – not applicable; no broad historical glorification, only bilateral ties mentioned. RU5 (Russia at the world’s forefront) – not applicable; no claims of superiority or achievements. RU6 (Russia’s culture/nature/heritage) – not applicable. Conclusion: The tweet promotes RU3.
